overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy exploring a lush tropical jungle. She traverses from a waterfall grotto through a shallow canyon stream, continues along a forest trail past mechanical ruins, and emerges into an open sandy clearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical waterfall grotto with red ferns

events.description: character steps from red vegetation into the shallow stream

agents.ego_description: walking through dense red ferns toward the waterfall and stepping into the stream

entered.detail: large waterfall cascading down rock face with mist
dense red vegetation covering the ground
tall palm trees near the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a lush tropical grotto with a prominent waterfall in the background. The character walks through dense red ferns and steps into a shallow stream, with palm trees and rock cliffs framing the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow canyon stream between high rock walls

events.description: water depth increases slightly as character wades deeper into the canyon

agents.ego_description: wading through the stream between narrow rock walls, splashing through the water

entered.detail: tall reddish rock cliff close to the path
rocky cliff face with hanging vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character wades through a narrow canyon stream with high rock walls on both sides. The waterfall and red ferns disappear from view as the camera moves deeper into the canyon, with palm trees visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle trail alongside the stream

events.description: exits the water onto the dirt path along the stream bank

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt trail through dense jungle vegetation, stream visible to the right

entered.detail: narrow dirt path winding through the jungle
large destroyed mechanical structure among the trees

segments.scene_description: Leaving the water behind, the character walks along a dirt trail through dense jungle. The stream remains visible to the right while large mechanical wreckage becomes visible in the distance among the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sandy clearing with mechanical ruins and distant beach

events.description: emerges from dense forest into open sandy area with clear sky view
passes by the mechanical wreckage on the left side

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the mechanical wreckage while entering the open sandy clearing

entered.detail: open sandy area with sparse vegetation and bright lighting
body of water visible beyond the sandy clearing

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense forest into a wide open sandy clearing with full sky visibility. She passes close by the large mechanical wreckage on the left, revealing a distant beach and water beyond the clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded tropical grotto that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit sandy clearing. It begins with the character walking through dense red ferns and stepping into a shallow stream beneath a prominent waterfall and towering rock cliffs. As the camera moves deeper, the waterfall fades from view and the environment narrows into a canyon stream flanked by high rock walls. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the water to follow a dirt trail through the dense jungle, where the stream recedes to the right and large mechanical wreckage appears among the trees. Finally, the forest canopy opens up to reveal a broad sandy clearing, passing the wreckage on the left to uncover a distant view of the beach and open water.
